summary:
CHURCH WARNINGS AND MEGA MINISTERS: Brandon discusses a stern message based on 1 Corinthians 5:5 directed at the global church and specifically mega ministers. He states that these leaders have prioritized fame, status, and money over warning their congregations about the imminent return of Jesus and the approaching Great Tribulation. Brandon claims that because these ministers have ignored divine instructions to preach urgency, a period of accelerated seedtime and harvest will occur, leading to a great shaking and cleansing within the church to separate the wheat from the tares. He notes that 2025 serves as a year of grace and warning before these severe trials begin.

GEOPOLITICAL PREDICTIONS AND CONFLICTS: Brandon outlines several global events, including the removal of key political figures and the occurrence of numerous small, back-to-back attacks designed to create fear and instability. He mentions specific threats involving a display of power in Oahu, Hawaii, and a flash event in a Times Square building during New Year's Eve, potentially involving Mayor Mamdani. Internationally, Brandon foresees a Red Dawn scenario, lone wolf attacks, and escalating tensions involving Ukraine, Russia, and Cuba. He also predicts the sudden removal of North Korean leadership, opening the nation to a rapid, massive spiritual revival that will sweep across Asia, the Middle East, Africa, and South America.

ECONOMIC CRISES AND DOMESTIC POLICIES: Brandon foresees a significant shaking in global finances and a major economic crash during the winter months, indicated symbolically by a red hollyberry bush. He specifically criticizes a forthcoming 50-year mortgage plan proposed by Donald Trump, describing it as a deceptive deal that will force citizens to pay disproportionate interest over their lifetimes. Furthermore, Brandon claims that 15 million dollars were hidden in a massive budget for biological weapons, and 24 billion dollars were placed into secret global accounts during the Biden administration to fund future political campaigns.

AGRICULTURAL FAILURES AND ENGINEERED PLAGUES: Brandon warns of severe future famines caused by genetically modified seeds that will fail to produce crops for an entire year. He also describes a coming plague, starting in Europe between November and December of a future year, peaking from January to May in 2027 or 2028. This plague will involve AI-spliced bubonic pathogens spread by lab rats, affecting both humans and animals, leading to the deliberate elimination of cattle and soaring beef prices.

WEATHER MANIPULATION AND NATURAL DISASTERS: Brandon claims that governments are using technologies like HAARP for weather warfare, creating superstorms, major hurricanes, and devastating winter events. He cites a Category 5 hurricane in Jamaica as a manipulated test and warns of massive snowstorms burying houses in areas like Buffalo, as well as thousand-mile-long crippling ice storms stretching from Oklahoma through Arkansas, Tennessee, and Kentucky.

FUTURE US LEADERSHIP AND SCANDALS: Brandon details political turbulence leading into 2026 and 2028, specifically focusing on JD Vance as a prominent future Republican figure. He warns of a fabricated Watergate-like scandal being prepared to derail Vance's rise, alongside calls for impeachment by Democrats in 2026 that will lack the necessary votes. Brandon mentions a vengeful prosecution involving Amy Coney Barrett and the grooming of a new Democratic candidate named Brian Donald. He also anticipates the uncovering of a major two-year adulterous affair involving a political figure, and significant unrest in Venezuela resembling the Iraq conflict, with Russian involvement and dark alliances tied to Cuba and Mexican leadership.

TARGETED EVENTS AND TERROR THREATS: Brandon issues specific warnings to watch for attacks on Black Friday at the Mall of America and the Atlanta airport, as well as vehicular attacks on holiday shoppers in Las Vegas and Rodeo Drive. He mentions plots involving Thanksgiving events, the Rockefeller tree lighting, Salt Lake City, and a summoning of dark forces during the upcoming Olympics opening ceremony in Europe.
rawData: [November 12, 2025]-[We have some things to pray about – warnings]-[https://youtu.be/Iug2hksEpUo]-[Well, good evening, family. Thank you for joining me again today. I really appreciate it. Let's pray tonight and we're going to seek the Lord, but I'll go over some things. I've taken some time and was seeking the Lord, and he visited me today, specifically about the church. And the things that he was talking to me about were very stern. He gave me 1 Corinthians 5:5 and he talked to me about the ministers of the church around the world and what's about to take place to the ones that will not listen, that have not proclaimed that Jesus Christ is coming and there's no urgency behind the pulpit. He talked to me about 1 Corinthians 5:5; he gave me the verse specifically for the church. And he talked to me about mega ministers that he's come to them, and they have lots of fame, lots of money, lots of status, and clout—whatever you say—all these people follow them. And he said, 'I've come to them and I've told them to preach certain messages and I've told them to tell my people that I'm coming, and they've turned a stiff neck toward me and they keep going the direction that they want to go. But I'm out of time. I'm out of time, Brandon. This dispensation of grace, this era, this season that we've been in is coming to an end. The Great Tribulation is right upon us. And I desire that no man should perish but all come to repentance. And because they have not listened, because they've not obeyed what I've asked them to do, seedtime and harvest is now accelerated. And whatsoever a man sows, that will he also reap.' He said, 'Brandon, I did not do what's about to happen. I took my hand off.' You can read that scripture in just a second. What was I saying? Acceleration of seedtime and harvest. And because of this, what you're about to see is a great shaking in my church. He said 2025 was a year of grace for warnings of what I've spoken and said over and over again. This will not catch them unaware. This will not catch them with their eyes closed. They know; they've been warned. And what you're about to see in the church is what I've been talking about, what the Lord has had me say over and over again to a lot of the elders. And he said, 'Brandon, I'll use you if you say the hard things, and I'm going to say the hard things.' And he said to me, 'A lot of these mega pastors that have multiple campuses and large congregations, I've wanted them to say certain things and warn my people that I'm coming and have an urgency behind the pulpit of my soon return, but they still do not. Their head is in the sand. Their eyes are closed to what's going on around them. It's money-based; it's fame-based. It's keeping the status quo because you don't want to lose your congregation if you preach a hard word about the Tribulation or the end times. So, you don't warn the people. You don't tell them what's coming.' So I saw 1 Corinthians 5:5. He said, 'I'll hand them over so that they don't burn in hell. They'll be shaken on this earth, but they'll be greatly tried in the days ahead. And you'll see ministers be greatly tried.' And he showed me specific ones—and I'll not say their names—but he told me these specific ministers. And he said, 'These men that you're seeing, these are the ones that will be at the forefront.' But he said, 'Brandon, it's a wake-up call for all my church, not just for the ones that are behind the pulpit, but for the whole church. It's a cleaning of the house. It's separating the wheat from the tares. It's getting the bride ready for what's about to take place.' And he said, 'I want you to pray into 2026. I want you to intercede into 2026.' I have had these visitations. I'm telling you, Diana has her phone full of words that he'll download about 2026 and 2027, but finishing this year and what he is requiring of his church and what he wants for us to do to bring in the lost. And it was a great shaking inside of me. I tell you that much. I repented. I said, 'My goodness, Lord, am I there?' Always realizing that he could use anybody—it's not just about me or Diana or our platform that God has given us—but being co-laborers with Christ, doing this with him and attract to deflect, staying vertical. I realize that there's a lot of demon-possessed people that follow me. I realize there's a lot of people that would try to be a distraction. And the Lord said, 'Brandon, there are a lot of demon-possessed people that need to be free.' And I don't say that laughing; it's serious. But there's a lot of it that the Lord has warned me about: the distractions and staying on course. Staying vertical; don't go horizontal. You must stay vertical for what's about to take place. And he talked to me about certain key political figures that will not be here very much longer. He talked to me about many 9/11s, and he emphasized the word 'many'. Small but many, many 9/11s. And there were people who said, 'What about Kim?' He said, 'There will be no more 9/11s. There'll be nothing like that.' You know what? I can't go by what the Lord told Kim. I go by what the Lord told me. And just like whenever the prophet went before the king and said, 'You are about to die,' but then he repented and he gave him 15 more years. There's things that change in the spirit realm, doors that are open in the spirit realm. Do you understand? Because of a people that have turned their back on God, that have voted in people that are not godly, that are standing for abominations to the Bible. So words are altered and changed just like they were in the Bible. Do you understand? And the Lord said to me, 'There is a different path. There are things that have changed in the spirit realm. And there are many 9/11s. There are many shakings coming,' and that's whenever he warned me that it will not be all of them all at the same time on the same day. Some of them will be, but they'll be back-to-back to create instability and fear so that you don't want to live a normal life, that you second-guess the freedoms that you have. And that's why they said it would be a flex even in Hawaii, on Oahu, Hawaii, that there's a group there that would try to have a flex, that they even infiltrated our islands. And the Lord said, 'You must pray to always be in the right place at the right time, listening to me, praying and seeking my face on a daily basis.' And like I said, I don't come on here to stir up fear. I come on here to have an urgency to pray. And we saw the eight. I said, 'I see the seven, but there's one standing out.' He wasn't a Democrat. That's what I learned. He was an independent and he voted with them. We give all the glory to Jesus because we all know that he's the potter and we're the clay. And how many people tell you, 'Oh, how awesome! You can see, you can hear.' But what was the rest of the message the same night? It was a warning to the church. It was a warning to the people about a major event in Times Square. John Lennon's song is about communism. Who got voted in? Socialism. Imagine by John Lennon is a socialist song. But look who got voted in. Not everything is always black and white when the Lord gives me a message. It's a type and shadow. The Lord's trying to tell you just to look into it; it's symbolic. What he is saying is that there's a flash. I saw that man on the stage, but I never told you. There are things that I'll never reveal, but I see these things when the flash took place. When you see in part, you hear in part, and I try to warn you about the other things. I've seen many attacks, lone wolf attacks, a 'Red Dawn' experience. Watch Cuba. Watch Ukraine. The Lord said, 'You heard right. It was 15 million.' Remember I said there was $15 million that was allocated that we're messing with? I was praying and he said it was right: 15 million, not 15 billion. 15 million is easier to hide when it comes to a trillion-dollar budget. 15 million is much easier to hide. You can mess around with 15 million when you have trillions. When you're pushing for a lot of corruption, 15 million is really easy to hide. When you're dealing with billions, there's a lot of slush funds that people don't realize where that money goes, but it's for biological weapons. Biological—there's a lot there. And remember I told you I saw 24 billion in a strategic account when Biden was in power. I saw 24 billion and it was being manipulated and put into secret accounts around the world. Do you remember that? I said they were using it and they'll use it for funding their campaigns in the future. They know a storm is coming. Many of them know a storm is coming, and the same thing with all these people getting stuck on Atlas. I told you all Atlas will become nothing watching the days ahead. It will become nothing. I've prayed over this, but there's another thing that will be what Oral Roberts saw looking at Atlas. I see Atlas, but as I'm looking at it, I'm looking at this thing and the Lord says, 'This is not what you're looking for.' There's something else bigger coming that will shake the world and it will be a sign of my Son's return. There will be fearful sights that you will see that will bring you to your knees. For man's hearts will fail them for fear, looking after those things that are coming on the earth. And that's what we're about to see. And he talked to me today more about the five shakings again: there'll be a shaking in politics, there'll be a shaking in the earth's crust, there'll be a shaking in the heavens, there'll be a shaking in the finances, and there'll be a shaking in my church. And there'll be shakings to the point where they'll all happen like labor pains upon a woman—back-to-back events happening all the time. Finances? 'The sky is falling.' Politics? People are saying, 'What's going on?' with what we see with the standoff. But the Lord said, 'I want you to pray into 2026 and I'll reveal things to you.' I started interceding and I saw the budget. I've warned you about Trump walking a pig that had makeup on, and it was the housing market. And as he was walking the pig and parading the pig, this new idea, the housing market started to go up. People were excited about this new pig idea, but a pig's still a pig; it's not good. And he comes out after I gave this word with a 50-year mortgage. 50-year mortgage! Oh, what a deal that is; you'll pay on your house for your whole life. I'm not trying to criticize because I know he watches, but it's just truth, sir: it's a pig. I just have to be bold and tell you the truth; it's a pig. And the Lord said the 50-year mortgage is not a good deal for the people. You'll pay interest for three times what that house is worth over the 50 years. So if you borrow a million dollars on a home, on the average house in California, you're going to pay over $5 million on that house if at 7% interest—or whatever it is—you'll pay over $5 million over 50 years. That's a terrible deal. But I believe it will pass and people will get this going, and the banks will do this because I saw him walking in the housing market, remember? And it was transparent; it wasn't solid. And I saw, come January in the next two months, there was some kind of something coming, and he had a golden quill in his hand, and it looked like something like the Declaration of Independence. There was something that he's about to sign. I saw this timeframe. Now, what year is it? That's what you have to know. When you're seeing in part, hearing in part, you don't always know what year it is, but you know it's coming. People wanted to know about the hollyberry bush: 'Brandon, is this the year of the major hollyberry bush, the red when the angel came to you and talked to you?' I remember. It was a life-exchanging experience with the Lord. I remember everything. The angel came to me and put his hands on my lips and he said, 'Brandon, you must be still. They're not dead yet. They can't handle it.' I said, 'Well, I want to tell them about the investments which you've given me.' And he said, 'They're not dead yet; you must be still.' And he said, 'Watch the hollyberry bush,' remember? And it was turning red, and the berries are red, and it was about the timeframe that a major crash would take place. And I saw the snowfall. I saw an Aston Martin in the driveway. There were things that the Lord showed me specifically, but I wrote on the copper pot that was tempered—it was all tattered and beat up—and I wrote a name. And I can't do that because everyone goes, 'You're trying to write the name! I know what you're writing!' No, I'm not telling you what it is, because the Lord said 'no' and the angel said, 'Shh.' But I'm telling you, I saw in this timeframe, it was during the winter months, I saw a major crash. Is it this year? No, I don't believe it's this year. Do I believe it's because there's a lot of people who think that the economic crisis is coming? The Lord said, 'I'm giving you a window.' This is my opinion. So if we go into a deep depression in January, you can't sit there and say, 'Well, you told us it was going to be great times.' That is in my opinion what the Holy Spirit told me, and I come on here and I pray with you and I tell you what I feel like the Lord's telling me. If it's wrong, I apologize; I'm human. But I tell you by what I feel in my spirit. It's me getting a perfect message from an imperfect vessel. I'm only perfected by his blood, and it's coming through a pipe that sometimes has stuff in it. I might have had a bad day, you know? And people say, 'Well, that's not like the people in the Bible.' And Brandon, I never claimed to be a prophet; never did. People try to label me that all the time. Watch me; I tell you, I'm here to pray. The Lord said, 'You're called to intercede. Pray for the nations, Brandon.' And I do. And he said, 'I'll show you what's to come and you can pray for it.' So I do the best I can. I saw that angel coming to me and telling me that. He said, 'And then I've warned you about a major shaking of the finances. I warned you about all these things, but the Lord said, "I'm giving you a window."' And a wave that's transparent will happen. And I saw it come, and it was at the beginning of the year. And a wave came and the finances were there. And great blessing was on the body of Christ for a window of time. It didn't last very long; the wave didn't last very long. And as the ground was gold—all on the gold was about that much—he said, 'Fill your pockets. Fill your pockets. For there's not much there, but it's enough to get you in the overflow for what's coming, for a great storm is coming.' A great storm is coming, and he still talks about that storm almost every day, warning me, keeping me on track, praying in the spirit. So, this is what I have for you today. I saw a major political figure in Israel be taken out. It will shake the nation. I saw old faces coming back because of this man. A great shaking is coming. The Lord said the third temple will be negotiated soon. There will be an acceleration of things in Israel with my people. But I can't say that word. He said, 'Be still no more.' You know, when you're on live and I have to watch what I say. The Lord said there will be things that I tell you from now on that you're not going to be able to talk about everything anymore. But we must pray now for Black Friday, specifically about the Mall of America and the Atlanta airport. You can have a list of things to pray for; the Mall of America and Atlanta are very serious, especially the airport. New Year's Eve, of course, Times Square. Do you know where the two men stand in Times Square on CNN? They stand on a platform, but their backs are facing the ball on this side. Can you tell me their names, please, son? He works for CNN, and the other guy is from Bravo. It doesn't matter; they're gay. This is Anderson Cooper and Andy Cohen, whatever his name is. Over on this side, there's a building right here. Midway up, there is something that happens in that building. There is a flash, a light that will come from there if we don't pray. You say, 'Well, Brandon, that's a cop-out.' No, I'm telling you what I see in these visions. But I saw a flash. What year? I don't know. Because of that man—do you know who I'm talking about? The guy that just won. The man that just won—oh, Mayor Mamdani. If he stands on the platform in January—this is the timeframe because he was standing on the platform greeting the people. He was there when this flash took place. So if he's there in January, we really pray about this. But if it's next year, I don't know. I see sometimes years in advance; sometimes I see it right in front of your face. This is seeing in part and hearing in part, but I saw his face. He's the one that pushes down the thing that makes the ball go, and as they sing that song, that flash took place. Now, why would the Muslim Brotherhood want to take out a Muslim? I don't know. That's why I don't understand everything I see, but I saw his face. Maybe it's not Braden because I saw Ukraine. What if it's not terrorists like that? Do you understand? I see in part. Do you remember I said I saw an arrow go to Ukraine, back to Russia, and back like this? I thought about that when I just said that. I piece everything together in my natural mind, which is often dangerous because you shouldn't add to or take away from anything the Lord shows you. But you try to make sense of it. I start going, 'Well, Lord, why would they try to hurt their own?' But what if it's not terrorists? Because I saw Ukraine and I saw an arrow pointing to Ukraine and Russia. As I saw Israel, I saw an old face coming back that was very liberal. He had an agenda to bring forth the Antichrist as quickly as possible and to run with this to bring forth the end times. What else was the Lord telling me about the man in Hawaii? He told you about the harvest that they're trying to modify. We talked about the seeds, and he said there'll be a year shortly where all your crops—farmers—will not produce because of a genetically modified seed for a certain crop. I believe it looked like corn or wheat, but he said there would be no harvest that year in America and around the world because a lot of the seeds being planted were tainted. It's supposed to be a more hearty seed, but it will not produce that year and it will cause famine because the seed was manipulated. What God has made is perfect. Man thinks he can take AI and create a super-seed that produces better, is more hearty, and doesn't die as easily. The poop they'll feed you. But whenever this happens, I saw a seed that will not produce for a whole entire year. There'll be nothing because they messed with nature. I saw superstorms again. I saw weather manipulation and weather warfare—governments manipulating warfare with weather. They will use it with things like HAARP to create superstorms in the days ahead. Sometimes you have major hurricanes and tornado seasons, and sometimes we have nothing. It's by design. Jamaica was a test; it was altered. The storm was a Category 5 and it was manipulated. They will continue to do this and use it for war. It will look so innocent, but many people will lose their lives because of it. Remember what the Lord said: as they try to gain control, they will lose control. They'll make storms that they lose control over, causing great devastation. It wasn't supposed to be that big, but they'll lose control because they're playing with things they have no business playing with. I saw great rain in areas and great drought. I saw snowstorms that will bury houses and cars. It will be massive. He even said Buffalo and major areas up East. I saw winter storms with 100 mph wind gusts and nor'easters, bad storms. So we pray over that because I saw people who couldn't get out of their houses. I saw ice storms that went from Oklahoma all the way up, crippling ice storms. People lost power for a long time because the purple was so deep. It was an ice storm that was terrible and went clear up through Arkansas, Tennessee, and Kentucky. It was different shades of pink, purple, and black. Major ice storms—they will be a thousand miles long. You say, 'Well, Brandon, you said a thousand miles long.' The Lord said 1 Corinthians 5:5. That's what you need to pay attention to right now. 1 Corinthians 5:5. That's what's coming: a major shaking to awaken, but a glorious church will rise. A lot of you are asleep. But he started talking about being the co-laborers in Christ. He said, 'Brandon, you're co-laborers with me. Don't you get it?' It's like a little toddler holding your daddy's hammer. It's like Braden is a little boy. "Hey, carry the hammer." You really don't need him to carry the hammer, but he is just a part of it because he's your child. "Hey, hold the fishing pole, buddy." So you hold the fishing pole and, really, he's not big enough to reel in that big catfish. He's up there and he's trying real hard, but you're the one with your hands on his, and you're reeling in that fish together. He's reeling in the fish together because you have God has His hand on yours; you're co-laborers. As He is, so are you in this world, and you're calling those things that be not as though they were. Romans, I believe, calling those things that be not as though they were. We're calling those things, and your co-laborers and you're reeling in the fish. He really doesn't need you, just as much as a toddler doesn't need Daddy. I mean, as much as the toddler thinks he's in charge and he's reeling in the fish. Do you get what I'm saying? You have a hold of that pole and the daddy's up there and he's reeling it in. But that little boy thinks, "Oh, I had a part in this," but the dad's just doing it because he's a good dad. That's the way it is with our Father. He's God of everything. He's over everything, you understand? But we're co-laborers. We're a part. He just has His hand on ours; He's helping reel in that fish. And He's saying, "Good job, buddy. You did it." But it's the anointing in you that breaks the yoke, but it's all His. He's sufficient. It's everything. It's all His, do you understand? Without Him, we can do nothing. "Apart from Me, you can do nothing." That's what Jesus said. "Apart from Him, I can do nothing." But His hand is on my fishing pole. That's the way He showed it to me today. He said, "Apart from Me, you can do nothing, Brandon. You can't see nothing. You are nothing without Me." Never forget that. I was out and I was blowing the leaves. Boy, the leaves are falling. We have a lot of oak trees and stuff. And the leaves were falling, and I said, "Lord, I don't know how I can keep doing this channel, all the things that You've asked me to do." He said, "Always remember that apart from Me, you can do nothing. Always remember the statement you just said, that you are depending on Me." We're co-laborers. I'm dependent on Him just to do this channel every single time I come on here and talk with y'all. I can do nothing without Him. I can't make the gift happen. When you all show up, 6,500 of you want to know what's coming next, I don't know. I'm a vessel. I decrease, He increases. I'm on His potter's wheel. And that's why I try to tell you, He uses a lot of you knuckleheads to try to send the emails probably to buffet my flesh, because I got a lot of haters. I got a lot of people who like me, but He said the same people who, just like they said to Brandon, "Hosanna in the highest," they were throwing the palm leaves down before me and they were excited about my coming, were the same ones that were saying "crucify Him" a couple days later. People's opinions will change like the water, like the wind, like the waves. It changes all the time. Tides come and they go. But what I'm trying to tell you is, that's what He told me about you all. He goes, "They'll be liking you in one moment, but I give you a hard word and they're going to hate you." But He said, "Always remain the same and do what I ask you to do." So that's what we do tonight. So let's take communion and let's pray together. Who wants to go tubing? That was what I had. Was it okay? Did y'all get anything out of that? I tried to do a little recap. I hadn't done a video in two days. I needed some time, and I seek Him. His hand is on my hand. I'm a glove and He fills the glove. I'm a glove and He fills the glove, and whenever He fills the glove, life comes into the glove. When He fills the glove, the glory comes into the glove. That's the way He described it to me when He visited me. He said, "My hand comes into you, your glove, and I operate. But apart from Me, you can do nothing. The glove is useless and lifeless without the Lord." He says, "As soon as I put My hand into that glove, supernatural power comes on you and you're able to pick things up." Right? Metaphor. The glory comes. I'm able to turn the pages in the Bible. I'm able to do things with the glove when the hand's in the glove. Father, we just thank You, Lord, for Your body that was broken for us. And we thank You, Lord, for all that You've showed us. We have this treasure in earthen vessels, that the excellency of the power may be of You and not of us. We bind the devil off of this prayer time, Father. And I thank You, Lord, that as He is, so are we in this world. And we apply the blood of Jesus. And we thank You, Lord, uninterrupted and unhindered by any satanic or demonic force, we plead the blood of Jesus over every single one of us. And we thank You, Lord, for Your mighty hand on this household, Father, over my finances, over my wife, my children, over all of us, that as He is, so are we in this world. Father, we thank You, Lord, that we're healed and whole and well. By Your stripes, we're healed. We apply the blood of Jesus. Hey, you know what? Go. Is your mom ready? Because I wanted her to pray with me. I'll let her take communion with me and she can pray. I'm going to bring in Diana so she can pray. I did the first half, and then I let her do what she was doing. And then I've been drinking my smoothies. I don't like these, but I get these from Tropical Smoothie Cafe, and I get the greens and it's like baby food. But the Lord told me to take care of myself more. I just go, "Isn't it funny how things that taste really bad are so good for you?" I mean, really, greens are gross. Is she coming? Yeah. Okay, move it back so she can stand up and come pray with us. Sorry for the delay. We had—we're at halftime. Well, not really even halftime, because I'm going to pray for Diana for about an hour, but halftime for you all, I guess, for intermission, a few moments later. We need the background music, you know, "We'll be back." Oh, our sponsor. I can tell you this. Can I say that? There is going to be an exposing of an adulterous affair that lasted two years prior, and a lot of people will be very disappointed. There'll be an adulterous affair uncovered in the days ahead that lasted for two years, and many people will be disappointed. But it will not derail everything. A great scandal. Come on. Let me get—you want me to get out, or you want to crawl over? Oh, I can just do this. I'll keep your shirt down. Sorry. There you go. Welcome. Hi. Welcome to the forest. Where are we at today, son? I forgot. Huh? Wait. Are we at the zoo? Are we at the beach? Where are we? Here, you can read First Corinthians 5:5 if you want. All right, let's pray. Will you take communion with me for a minute? Oh, Father. Okay, and going to verse four, the verse before, it says, "In the name of our Lord Jesus Christ..." Speak loud. Sorry, let me see. "In the name of our Lord Jesus Christ, when you are gathered together, along with my spirit, with the power of our Lord Jesus Christ, deliver such a one to Satan for the destruction of the flesh, that his spirit may be saved in the day of the Lord Jesus."
